OSDC advisories silent patches

Silent patch detection

352 suspects 1432 commits scanned 2026-04-14
Commits from 240 high-value repos scored by structural heuristics (file paths, code patterns, unsafe-to-safe replacements) and matched against 12K+ vulnerability fingerprints from PatchDB. No LLM involved. Higher score = higher probability of unreported security fix.
